name: Haunted Heroes — Dungeon Character Pack
description:
A set of 160 hand-crafted pixel art sprites in the Kairosoft management sim style. Each sprite has been quality-checked against the 0x72 Dungeon Tileset standard with curated retro palettes.

**Includes:**
- 160 unique sprites (16×16)
- Transparent PNG files
- Game-ready pixel art
- CC0 license — use in any project
